-------- 363145790188044@newsletter ------------- BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals ANNOUNCEMENT The BWF conﬁrms a correction to France's published team lineup for their BWF Thomas Cup Final against China. France advised that an administrative mistake during the team submission process had resulted in Lucas Renoir being entered in men's doubles instead of Christo Popov. Acting under General Competition Regulations 17.1.1, the BWF Tournament Referee Team assessed the situation, accepted a mistake was made, and deemed the correction was required. Both teams have been informed, and the team lineups and Order of Play have been republished. #ThomasUberCupFina|s #Horsens2026
